productDisplayName: Puma Men Suede Archive Red Casual Shoes
description: Get trendy and comfortable with these suede archive NM shoes from puma. A contemporary lifestyle pair of shoes they come in attractive colours, they are sure to add zing to your weekends. Pair these with jeans and tees for that uber cool look.UpperSuede upper with foam-stripe for added durability and stylePerforations on the side for breathable comfortLace ups for a snug and customised Fitpuma logo and name in funky print on the lateral sideSuede overlay on the heel cup with logo printed MidsoleTextured PU midsole with rubber toe box for enhanced protectionBranding embossed on the heel for styleOutsoleTPU outsole with waffle patterned grooves for maximum grip and tractionBrand name embossed at the midfoot for suction
